name: Mod5r
description: Developer of a wealth management platform designed to provide automated & recurring investment services, making wealth management accessible to all. The company's platform allows people to add their financial goals, integrate bank accounts, compare and choose from different financial products across all banks and monitor their financial growth, enabling users to make informed financial decisions.

name: AMWAL
description: Operator of a debt-based crowdfunding platform intended to let retail investors lend short-term loans to SMEs. The company's platform facilitates investors to invest in small and medium businesses in the form of loans, enabling small businesses and companies to raise funds for growth while allowing investors to earn returns on their investments.

name: Deben
description: Developer of a financial platform designed to control multiple bank accounts in real-time with one view. The company's platform offers a system that is integrated and controlled automatically through cash reporting, forecasting, analysis, reconciliation, and bank integrations, helping businesses to analyze, report, and forecast cash flow, faster through integrations with all the bank accounts.

name: Egab
description: Operator of a digital media platform intended to empower local journalists. The company platform creates profiles, publishes news, articles and stories in regional and international media outlets, enabling local journalists and media outlets to publish inspiring stories for global audiences.

name: Joy
description: Operator of a car servicing platform intended to offer car maintenance services. The company offers various services such as tire changes, oil changes, battery replacement, car wash, detailing and roadside assistance, enabling customers to get provided with all types of services in the comfort of their homes.

name: Karaz Platform
description: Developer of a diabetic health monitoring platform intended to simplify, gamify, and personalize health within the supportive community. The company's platform provides diabetic supplies, telemedicine, personalized diabetic coaching, and support needed to take an active approach toward good health, enabling users to easily manage their diabetes by adjusting and monitoring their blood sugar, nutrition, medication, and physical activity and helping them live a better life.

name: MEDICAL INTELLIGENCE CO
description: Operator of an online marketplace intended to sell medical goods. The company's marketplace offers hospital supplies, and medical products, enabling medical suppliers to connect with clinics.

name: Monak E-Services
description: Developer of a fintech platform intended to provide financial inclusion and life services to migrants via partnered networks in the Middle East. The company's platform aims to solve the struggles that migrants are facing coming to the Middle East by providing end-to-end life services to create a comfortable and stress-free living, enabling users to get health, beauty, payment, and delivery solutions within a single application.

name: Neqabty
description: Developer of a mobile-based financial application designed to provide automated syndicate services. The company's application offers payment of service costs, medical services, and booking events and trips, enabling clients to pay for their medical applications such as prescriptions, renewals, and medical fees.

name: NutriCal
description: Developer of a web-based software intended to facilitate businesses in the food industry to understand and effectively communicate data about their food. The company provides data and intelligence to businesses in the food industry such as calories, nutrition, allergies, and so on enabling clients to comply with local regulations, food labeling, and consumer marketing.

name: Stuck
description: Developer of an on-demand technology platform designed to provide quality and hassle-free writing. The company's platform helps to provide translation from Arabic to English, proofreading of the documents, rephrasing and revamping the contents, content development, and language branding to create the desired tone and message, enabling individuals and businesses to get language support.

name: Walzay
description: Operator of a talent marketplace intended to provide full-time job opportunities with innovative companies and teams. The company allows candidates to explore opportunities around the world for in-office or remote roles, enabling candidates to avail an efficient hiring platform and companies to get suitable candidates for their job roles.

name: Wellxai
description: Opeartor of an insurance technology intended to support wellness activities. The company aims to disrupt the insurance landscape in the region by offering individuals, families, corporates, and SMEs health insurance that incentivizes engagement in various wellness activities such as gym visits, healthy eating, focusing on mental wellness, utilizing wearable tech, and also provides a third-party embedded device along with an application that monitors health, enabling users to make efficient insurance decisions.
